name: 宁红夜
bio: 玉山盲剑客，血液中流淌着致命毒素。她美丽而危险，双刃随时待命。她的双眼将在命运之时方才睁开。
bio_en: The Blind Blademaster of Yushan, Viper Ning's very blood has long been suffused with lethal poison. As beautiful as she is deadly, her blades are ever at the ready.
story: 玉山盲剑客宁红夜，血液中流淌着致命毒素。她美丽而危险，以毒为剑，以感知代替视觉，立于人类之巅。她的双眼将在命运之时方才睁开，在那之前，她以无尽的修炼等待着那一刻的到来。

skills.skill_description: 凝聚气力向前释放，造成击退效果，可打断敌人蓝色蓄力。可在受击时使用。冷却时间25秒。
skills.skill_description_en: Concentrate Qi and release it forward, knocking back enemies. Can be used while taking damage. Cooldown: 25s.

skills.skill_description: 凝聚气力向前释放，使敌人沉默8秒，无法使用技能和终极技能。冷却时间15秒。
skills.skill_description_en: Release Qi forward, silencing enemies for 8s. Cooldown: 15s.

skills.skill_description: 召唤月煞之眼锁定附近敌人，持续5秒并使其眩晕5秒。怒气上限75000。
skills.skill_description_en: Summon the God of Yin's eye to mark and stun nearby enemies. Rage limit: 75000.

skills.skill_description: 召唤月煞之眼后可对锁定目标发动攻击，可打断黄色蓄力，自身获得40%伤害减免。
skills.skill_description_en: After summoning the eye, attack marked targets and interrupt Golden Focus. Gain 40% damage reduction.
